NCT00007943.label: Outcome
NCT00007943.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT00007943.text: METHODS: In this international trial conducted in 30 hospitals, we randomly assigned patients with a solitary adenocarcinoma of the rectum within 15 cm of the anal verge, not invading adjacent tissues, and without distant metastases to undergo either laparoscopic or open surgery in a 2:1 ratio.

NCT00026273.label: Outcome
NCT00026273.source: Journal of negative results in biomedicine
NCT00026273.text: The treated groups received orally venlafaxine (10 or 50 mg/kg) one hour before the experimental periodontal disease induction and daily for 10 days.
